raw.objective: “the population pharmacokinetic parameters estimated might assist the clinician in the individualization of drug dosing regimens”
raw.covariates: Tested: WT< Age, CLNZ dose, gender, comedication of VPA Included: WT, comedication of VPA on CL, WT on Vd
raw.observations: Simplified PK model only characterises Css, which does not allow absorption/distribution phases
raw.dose: Steady state oral doses in patients
raw.equations: CL=theta1*(WT**theta2)*(theta3**VPA)*(1+eta1) Cssipred=D/(CL*Tau) Cssobs=Cssipred*(1+eps1) Css=steady state concentrations D=CLNZ dose Tau=dosing interval VPA= comedication with VPA (1=yes, 0=no)

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL=theta1*(WT**theta2)*(theta3**VPA)*(1+eta1) Cssipred=D/(CL*Tau) Cssobs=Cssipred*(1+eps1) Css=steady state concentrations D=CLNZ dose Tau=dosing interval VPA= comedication with VPA (1=yes, 0=no)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady state oral doses in patients
study.objective: “the population pharmacokinetic parameters estimated might assist the clinician in the individualization of drug dosing regimens”

covariates.raw: Tested: WT< Age, CLNZ dose, gender, comedication of VPA Included: WT, comedication of VPA on CL, WT on Vd

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
